name: Repair The 256x128 Half-Panel Register-Reuse Branch

summary.name: Repair The 256x128 Half-Panel Register-Reuse Branch
summary.hypothesis: Round 21 showed that the grouped-row non-PTX sibling is a valid alternate surface, but it did not open new headroom: it landed at 24.178688 ms, only 0.014416 ms behind the PTX best, while preserving essentially the same machine state at about 48.3% tensor activity, 16.6% active warps, 5.44% barrier stall, and 7.23% long scoreboard. Under the user's new rule, that means the search should stop rotating between near-tied plateau surfaces and instead spend a round on the one historical family that actually attacked the limiting resource. The half-panel 256x128 register-reuse branch is that family. Its best correctness-repair snapshot at commit 778a0b4 still failed correctness, but it preserved the only clear occupancy breakthrough in the repo: low-90s registers per thread, occupancy limit back to 2, active warps around 32.9%, and tensor activity above 43%. If the target is truly far below 24 ms, this is the right aggressive branch to rehydrate now.
summary.expected_bottleneck: Register-limited occupancy and oversized live state on the wide hot-band family, which the plateaued PTX and sibling surfaces are no longer moving.
summary.risk: High. This is a historical repair branch with known correctness debt and broad kernel-surface drift, but it is also the only branch with evidence of a real occupancy-state change.
metrics_to_recheck: correctness pass rate across all 3 cases
ranking_notes: This now ranks first because the current correct surfaces are all clustered in the same 24.16-24.18 ms noise band.
The half-panel branch is the only archived family that materially changed occupancy and live-state pressure in the right direction.
The immediate goal of this round is not a guaranteed win; it is to re-enter the only branch with evidence of a much lower roofline if correctness can be repaired.
summary.stop_condition: Stop if the rehydrated branch loses the low-register, high-active-warps signature that justified reopening it, or if correctness still fails without any retained occupancy advantage.

notes: Node C may now implement this one candidate.
